title: Prominent extended containers
description: extension for Prominent UI resource pack for some mods
body:
**This resource pack is UI redraw for some of the mods from the [Prominence](https://modrinth.com/modpack/prominence-2-fabric) mod pack**

**This resource pack aims to expand the UI for mods that are not officially adapted to the style of the mod pack**

**Currently supported mods:**
- Traveler's Backpack
- Iron Chests: Restocked
- [Let's Do] Beachparty
